summary: Completed comprehensive testing of e-commerce application. Backend APIs fully functional (24/24 tests passed). Admin functionality working perfectly. Frontend UI loads correctly but missing Add to Cart buttons on product pages.

ui_bugs.issue: Add to Cart button not visible on product detail pages
ui_bugs.impact: Users cannot add items to cart through UI

ui_bugs.issue: No Add to Cart buttons on homepage product cards
ui_bugs.impact: Users cannot add items to cart from homepage

integration_issues.issue: Cart APIs work but UI lacks Add to Cart buttons

success_percentage.frontend: 80% (UI loads correctly, admin works, but cart interaction missing)

action_item_for_main_agent: Add 'Add to Cart' buttons to product detail pages and homepage product cards. The cart APIs are working perfectly (tested via backend), but the frontend UI is missing the buttons to trigger cart operations. This prevents users from adding items to cart and testing the complete checkout flow.
